deals.Description: A fabless AI chip startup designing AI chips and outsourcing fabrication. They are a global leader in AI inference infrastructure.
deals.Investors: Mirae Asset Financial Group, Korea National Growth Fund, Korea Development Bank, No & Partners, IMM Investment, Intervest, Aramco, Arm, Kindred Ventures, KT, Samsung, SK Hynix, SK Telecom

deals.Description: An AI startup that jointly won the '2026 Global AI Startup Competition'.
A Seoul-based company specializing in conversational AI and AI contact center (AICC) solutions. Its flagship product, ConvAI, helps organizations integrate various LLM engines.
An AI-powered financial management and financing platform for businesses. Its core product, Clobe AI, is a SaaS solution that aggregates financial data for real-time cash flow insights.
An edtech firm developing an AI-enhanced collaborative learning platform (KlassMate) and an AI teaching assistant. The company plans to transition to a Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) revenue model.
A Seoul-based rental SaaS platform offering a cloud-based solution for managing rental and subscription business lifecycles, connecting various industry stakeholders.
deals.Investors: Hyundai Motor Zero One, Coolidge Corner Investment

deals.Description: Develops an artificial intelligence (AI) model that analyzes sound data generated by the human body to assess health conditions, expanding from urological to respiratory disease monitoring.
A generative AI startup that has become South Korea's first AI unicorn. It develops proprietary large language model 'SOLAR' and document-processing AI 'Document Parse' for enterprise workflows.
deals.Investors: Sequoia Capital, Sage Partners, Hyundai Motor, Kia, KB Securities, InterVest, Mirae Asset Venture Investment, Premier Partners, Shinhan Venture Investment, Axiom Asia, Woori Venture Partners, IBK Industrial Bank of Korea

deals.Description: The technology and IT services arm of the Samsung Group. It focuses on enhancing AI capabilities and digital transformation services.
deals.Investors: KKR (led by KKR Asia Fund IV)

deals.Description: An AI chip startup developing neural processing units (NPUs) for generative AI robots, factories, and self-driving cars. It is expanding its partnership with Hyundai Motor Group.

deals.Startup_Name: Naver Cloud (Gak Sejong AI Data Center)
deals.Description: A project by Naver Cloud to build a massive AI data center in Sejong City. This infrastructure will support Naver's hyper-scale AI 'HyperCLOVA X' and enhance domestic AI capabilities.
deals.Investors: South Korea's National Growth Fund (Public Growth Fund)

deals.Description: An AI-native cybersecurity company specializing in application security verification. Its core product, AutoProof, uses AI to simulate real-world attack scenarios.
A Korean startup developing original IP and production technology powered by AI. It operates as a fully AI-native studio, conceiving and developing original IP across film, drama, and animation.
deals.Investors: Baby Shark Next Global Content Fund (managed by SmartStudy Ventures)
